center.name: 大洋洲
center.summary: 大洋洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括银肩果鸠、弯嘴滨鹬、美洲尖尾濱鷸等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Australian rufous fantail can be found in parts of Australia, southeast Asia, and in the Oceanic regions of Micronesia and Melanesia. They are residents of the Lesser Sunda Islands and the Maluku Islands of Indonesia, southern New Guinea and its associated islands, the Solomon Islands, the Marianas and the Carolinian island of Yap

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|An immature brown goshawk flying in Tasmania, Australia The brown goshawk (Tachyspiza fasciata) is a medium-sized bird of prey in the family Accipitridae found in Australia and surrounding islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Ardea plumifera |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22727683A264991189 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22727683A264991189.en |access-date=29 November 2025}} | genus = Ardea | species = plumifera | authority = (Gould, 1848) | synonyms = | range_map = Ardea_plumifera_range.png | range_map_caption = }} The plumed egret (Ardea plumifera) is a species of heron native to Australia and Oceania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: After the breeding season, it migrates south to spend the winter in Africa and along the coasts of Oceania and southern Eurasia, occupying tidal mudflats and saltpans

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title=The Breeding Habits of the Pectoral Sandpiper (Actodromas maculata) |journal=The Auk | publisher=American Ornithologists' Union, etc | volume=1 |pages=218–221 | date=1884 | doi=10.2307/4066833 | jstor=4066833 | issn=0004-8038 | url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/27446101 | access-date=2025-10-23}} Erolia melanotos | range_map = Calidris melanotos map.svg }} The pectoral sandpiper (Calidris melanotos), often abbreviated pec, is a small, migratory wader that breeds in arctic regions of North America and Asia, wintering in South America and Oceania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, vagrant individuals have been identified all over South and Central America, Asia, and Oceania as seen below. Vagrants have been found in Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, El Salvador, French Southern Territories, Guatemala, Indonesia, Japan, Kiribati, Marshall Islands, Nauru, Nicaragua, Niue, Norfolk Island, Northern Mariana Islands, Palau, Panama, Papua New Guinea, Peru, Philippines, Pitcairn, Samoa, Tokelau, Tonga, Tuvalu, United States Minor Outlying Islands, and Wallis and Futuna. The Tahiti petrel requires both terrestrial and marine systems and is often found in both shallow and oceanic marine habitats as well as shrubland and forest habitat types. In terms of marine habitats, they prefer water with surface temperatures higher than 25°C. Consequently, El Niño events may have an influence on their abundance in waters of the East Pacific.{{Cite journal |last1=Ribic |first1=Christine A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tanna fruit dove can be found in Vanuatu, a country in Oceania
